---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Omnivert
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? A clear description of the problem
this feature would solve.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Omnivert to do.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, example inputs/outputs, links, or anything else that helps explain the request.
